title: Mir Phase Ledger Schema
description: Structured ledger of Mir harness phases (P0-X / P2-X / V2.X). Replaces the free-form Step N text in plan.md as the machine-readable source of truth for phase tracking, dependencies, and TDD cross-references.

current_phase.description: Phase id currently in progress (must match an entry in phases[]). Optional; absent means the ledger is fully closed (no in_progress phase).

id.description: Phase identifier. Examples: P0-A, P0-E.2, P2-B, V2.1, V2.3, P2.6.1 (multi-dot allowed).

step_index.description: Monotonic step number matching plan.md Step N. Must be unique across phases.

finished.description: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. Required when status == done.

deps.description: List of phase ids that must be done before this phase enters.

tdd_links.description: List of tasks/tdd.json change ids that cover this phase. Cross-ref-checked when tasks/tdd.json is present.

artifacts.description: Repo-relative paths produced by this phase.

superseded_by.description: Phase id that supersedes this entry. Set when an earlier phase is closed because its scope is now owned by a later phase.
